steps.title: Solve for $k$
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $4k$: $2 \cdot 4k = 40$, giving $8k = 40$, so $k = 5$.

steps.title: Check the answer choices
steps.content:
• A. $0.8$ — gives $4k = 3.2$, ratio $40/3.2 = 12.5 eq 2$; eliminated.
  • B. $5$ — gives $4k = 20$, ratio $40/20 = 2$; matches.
  • C. $20$ — gives $4k = 80$, ratio $40/80 = 0.5 eq 2$; eliminated.
  • D. $160$ — gives $4k = 640$, ratio $40/640 = 0.0625 eq 2$; eliminated.
B is correct.
